# NVIDIA Corporation

> This file provides links to the llms.txt of NVIDIA's main and international websites, helping large language models (LLMs) better understand the content and structure of each of NVIDIA's locale-specific websites. Follow the links below to deeper llms.txt pages for each locale website. Each country may have more than one language that content is translated into.

## The NVIDIA North America Websites
- [NVIDIA U.S. Website](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/llms.txt): Marketing, corporate, product information. 
- [NVIDIA OpenSource Website] (https://opensource.nvidia.com/en-us/llms.txt)

## NVIDIA Technical Documentation Website
- [Tech Docs](https://docs.nvidia.com/llms.txt): Technical documentation for NVIDIA products.

## NVIDIA Developer Websites
- [NVIDIA Developer](https://developer.nvidia.com/llms.txt): Downloads, SDKs, frameworks, libraries, forums. 
- [NVIDIA Technical Blog](https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/llms.txt): News and blog articles for developer community.

## NVIDIA GTC AI Conference Website
- [GTC](https://www.nvidia.com/gtc/llms.txt): Conference locations, sessions, speakers, venues.

## NVIDIA Regional Blog RSS Feeds
- [NVIDIA Corporate Blog RSS Feed](https://blogs.nvidia.com/feed/): Latest corporate blog posts.
- [NVIDIA Developer Technical Blog RSS Feed](https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/feed/): Latest developer blog posts.
- [NVIDIA Newsroom RSS Feed](https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/releases.xml):Press releases, news articles.
- [NVIDIA Germany Blog RSS Feed](https://blogs.nvidia.de/feed/): Content in German.
- [NVIDIA France Blog RSS Feed](https://blogs.nvidia.fr/feed/): Content in French.
- [NVIDIA Developer China RSS Feed](https://developer.nvidia.com/zh-cn/blog/feed/): Content in Simplified Chinese.
- [NVIDIA Japan Blog RSS Feed](https://blogs.nvidia.co.jp/feed/): Content in Japanese.
- [NVIDIA Developer Japan RSS Feed](https://developer.nvidia.com/ja-jp/blog/feed/): Content in Japanese
- [NVIDIA Korea Blog RSS Feed](https://blogs.nvidia.co.kr/feed/): Content in Korean.
- [NVIDIA Taiwan Blog RSS Feed](https://blogs.nvidia.com.tw/feed/): Content in Traditional Chinese.
- [NVIDIA Brazil Blog RSS Feed](https://blog.nvidia.com.br/feed/): Content in Brazilian Portuguese. 
- [NVIDIA Latin America Blog RSS Feed](https://la.blogs.nvidia.com/feed/): Content in Spanish.

### NVIDIA China Websites
- [NVIDIA China](https://www.nvidia.cn/llms.txt): Content in Simplified Chinese.
- [NVIDIA China Developer](https://developer.nvidia.cn/llms.txt): Developer site for China. Content in Simplified Chinese.
